name: chr3_3p25_RAF1_paralog
description: 3p25 region containing the RAF1 oncogene and its surrounding low-copy repeat cluster. RAF1 has functional paralogs (ARAF on Xp11.4, BRAF on 7q34) elsewhere in the genome, but the 3p25 LCRs mediate rare local duplications and somatic SVs in solid tumours.

architecture.internal_structure: Flanking SD pair of 20-60 kb at ~93% identity around RAF1; dispersed paralog signal to ARAF/BRAF outside the locus.
